title: sphenomeris chinensis var. divaricata
intro: Sphenomeris chinensis var. divaricata, also known as the Chinese forked sphenomeris, is a rare and unique plant species belonging to the fern family (Ophioglossaceae). It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and improving respiratory function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea, or used in combination with other herbs in formulations to aid in treating various health conditions.
